basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 108 Anganwadi Worker Posts in Bhadohi District
basic_details.short_information: This table summarizes the key details of the Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026 notified by the District Programme Officer, Bhadohi.

qualification.details: The minimum qualification for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent, with a maximum qualification of Postgraduate. | Minimum qualification: Intermediate (10+2) or equivalent. Maximum qualification: Postgraduate. Merit will be prepared by adding marks obtained from Intermediate up to the highest qualification (up to Postgraduate) held by the candidate.

selection_process: Selection to the Anganwadi Karyakatri post in Bhadohi is made purely on a merit-and-priority basis as per the government order.
Merit is prepared by adding marks scored from Intermediate up to the candidate's highest educational qualification (maximum Postgraduate). Priority category candidates (widowed/divorced BPL women
then other BPL women) are considered first

followed by above-poverty-line candidates in the same order. Only candidates residing in the same Gram Sabha/Ward as the vacant post are considered. Errors or incomplete applications are summarily rejected; no offline forms are accepted at any stage.
how_to_apply: Visit the official departmental portal: upanganwadibharti.in.
Locate the online application link for Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026.
Fill in personal, residence, and educational details carefully and accurately in the prescribed online format.
Upload self-attested scanned copies of all required documents as specified on the portal.
Review all entries carefully, since the applicant alone is responsible for any errors in the submitted application.
Submit the form online before the last date of 25-07-2026.
Save or print the submitted application/acknowledgment for future reference.
important_instructions: Only online applications through upanganwadibharti.in will be accepted; no offline application will be entertained under any circumstances. Incomplete or erroneous applications will be summarily rejected. Caste and income certificates must be issued by a competent authority, digitally signed, and verifiable online on the eDistrict UP portal. As per government policy, a family cannot have both Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika selected at the same Anganwadi Centre. Detailed vacancy information will be displayed on the notice boards of the District Programme Office, Block Development Officer, and Child Development Project Officer offices, and is also available on the departmental website. In case of any discrepancy regarding vacancies or reservation, the decision will be taken by the department after resolving the issue during the selection process, and the department's decision will be final.

content_sections.heading: Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: This table summarizes the key details of the Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026 notified by the District Programme Officer, Bhadohi.

rows.details: Office of the District Programme Officer (DPO), Bhadohi
Amoli, Aurai, Gyanpur, Bhadohi, Suriyawan, Shahar, Deeh

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026 should note the following key date.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details (Project-wise and Category-wise)
content_sections.text: The 108 Anganwadi Karyakatri vacancies under Bhadohi Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 are distributed project-wise, with category-wise reservation as notified.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must satisfy the gender, residence, and qualification conditions notified for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post in Bhadohi district. Only female candidates are eligible for the advertised posts. The applicant must be a resident of the same Gram Sabha/Ward for which she is applying. Income and caste certificates must be issued by a competent authority and be digitally signed, verifiable online through the eDistrict UP portal. Income certificates must be issued as per UP Government Revenue Section-9 Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Sa0-9 dated 30-09-2021 (as amended), by a competent authority, and must be verifiable online. As per government order, a family in which one member is already selected as Anganwadi Karyakatri cannot have another member selected as Anganwadi Sahayika at the same Anganwadi Centre, and vice versa.

rows.details: Date of birth as recorded in High School marksheet/certificate

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: The minimum qualification for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent, with a maximum qualification of Postgraduate. Minimum qualification: Intermediate (10+2) or equivalent. Maximum qualification: Postgraduate. Merit will be prepared by adding marks obtained from Intermediate up to the highest qualification (up to Postgraduate) held by the candidate.

content_sections.heading: Selection Priority
content_sections.text: Selection for Anganwadi Karyakatri posts under this recruitment follows a defined order of priority based on economic and social status. First priority is given to widowed or legally divorced women from families living below the poverty line (BPL). Next priority is given to other women from families living below the poverty line. If no candidate from the below-poverty-line category is available, candidates from above-poverty-line families are selected in the same order of priority described above.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection to the Anganwadi Karyakatri post in Bhadohi is made purely on a merit-and-priority basis as per the government order. Merit is prepared by adding marks scored from Intermediate up to the candidate's highest educational qualification (maximum Postgraduate). Priority category candidates (widowed/divorced BPL women, then other BPL women) are considered first, followed by above-poverty-line candidates in the same order. Only candidates residing in the same Gram Sabha/Ward as the vacant post are considered. Errors or incomplete applications are summarily rejected; no offline forms are accepted at any stage.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload self-attested copies of the following documents while filling the online application form. High School marksheet/certificate (for proof of date of birth) Intermediate and higher educational qualification certificates/marksheets Caste certificate, digitally signed and verifiable on the eDistrict UP portal Income certificate issued as per the applicable UP Government order, digitally signed and verifiable online Residence proof of the Gram Sabha/Ward for which application is made Widow/Divorce certificate, where applicable, for candidates claiming priority category Below Poverty Line (BPL) proof, where applicable

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Applicants should be careful while filling the Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri online application to avoid rejection. Applying for a Gram Sabha/Ward other than one's actual place of residence. Uploading caste or income certificates that are not digitally signed or not verifiable on the eDistrict UP portal. Submitting the application after the online window closes on 25-07-2026. Entering incorrect marks or educational details that do not match uploaded certificates. Attempting to submit an offline application, since the notice clearly states offline forms will not be accepted under any circumstances. Applying from a household where another family member is already engaged as Anganwadi Karyakatri or Sahayika at the same Anganwadi Centre.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online for Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official departmental portal: upanganwadibharti.in. Locate the online application link for Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026. Fill in personal, residence, and educational details carefully and accurately in the prescribed online format. Upload self-attested scanned copies of all required documents as specified on the portal. Review all entries carefully, since the applicant alone is responsible for any errors in the submitted application. Submit the form online before the last date of 25-07-2026. Save or print the submitted application/acknowledgment for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only online applications through upanganwadibharti.in will be accepted; no offline application will be entertained under any circumstances. Incomplete or erroneous applications will be summarily rejected. Caste and income certificates must be issued by a competent authority, digitally signed, and verifiable online on the eDistrict UP portal. As per government policy, a family cannot have both Anganwadi Karyakatri and Sahayika selected at the same Anganwadi Centre. Detailed vacancy information will be displayed on the notice boards of the District Programme Office, Block Development Officer, and Child Development Project Officer offices, and is also available on the departmental website. In case of any discrepancy regarding vacancies or reservation, the decision will be taken by the department after resolving the issue during the selection process, and the department's decision will be final.

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi Karyakatri vacancies are there in Bhadohi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 108 total vacancies across seven projects: Amoli, Aurai, Gyanpur, Bhadohi, Suriyawan, Shahar, and Deeh.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Anganwadi Karyakatri post in Bhadohi?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as on 01 January 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Minimum qualification is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent, and maximum qualification considered is Postgraduate.

faq.question: Q5. Can male candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, only female candidates are eligible for the Anganwadi Karyakatri posts advertised in this notice.

faq.question: Q6. Who gets priority in the selection process?
faq.answer: Widowed or legally divorced women from below-poverty-line families get first priority, followed by other below-poverty-line women, and then above-poverty-line candidates in the same order if BPL candidates are unavailable.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I apply for Bhadohi Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official portal upanganwadibharti.in; no offline applications are accepted.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification does not mention any application fee for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post.

faq.question: Q9. Can a candidate apply for any Gram Sabha/Ward of her choice?
faq.answer: No, the candidate must be a resident of the same Gram Sabha/Ward for which she is applying.

faq.question: Q10. Can two members of the same family be selected at the same Anganwadi Centre?
faq.answer: No, as per government order, one family cannot have both an Anganwadi Karyakatri and an Anganwadi Sahayika selected at the same Anganwadi Centre.
